title: Party Chat
opening: Hi there! How are you enjoying the evening?

t1.prompt: Hi there! How are you enjoying the evening?
t1.promptTranslation: Hi there! How are you enjoying the evening?

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you say that again?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. Could you say that again?

t-end.prompt: It was great chatting with you! Enjoy the rest of the evening!
t-end.promptTranslation: It was great chatting with you! Enjoy the rest of the evening!

t2.prompt: That's good to hear! So, anything interesting on the horizon? Perhaps some exciting weekend plans, or a hobby you're really into lately?
t2.promptTranslation: That's good to hear! So, anything interesting on the horizon? Perhaps some exciting weekend plans, or a hobby you're really into lately?

t3_weekend.prompt: Sounds great! It's always good to have something to look forward to. What kind of activities do you typically gravitate towards – anything from relaxing at home to adventurous outings?
t3_weekend.promptTranslation: Sounds great! It's always good to have something to look forward to. What kind of activities do you typically gravitate towards – anything from relaxing at home to adventurous outings?

t3_hobby.prompt: That's fantastic! Hobbies are such a vital part of life. What is it about that you find most engaging, and how long have you been at it?
t3_hobby.promptTranslation: That's fantastic! Hobbies are such a vital part of life. What is it about that you find most engaging, and how long have you been at it?

t3_work.prompt: Ah, the daily grind! Is it something you're passionate about, or more of a means to an end? It's always interesting to hear what people do.
t3_work.promptTranslation: Ah, the daily grind! Is it something you're passionate about, or more of a means to an end? It's always interesting to hear what people do.

t4_wrapup.prompt: That's really interesting! It was a pleasure getting to know a bit about what makes you tick. I should probably mingle a bit more, but it was genuinely nice speaking with you.
t4_wrapup.promptTranslation: That's really interesting! It was a pleasure getting to know a bit about what makes you tick. I should probably mingle a bit more, but it was genuinely nice speaking with you.
